## 🧪 Test Story
As a developer, I want to test [feature/module], so that it behaves correctly and edge cases are handled.
 
---

**Feature:** [e.g. Authentication / Spot validation]

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] E2E tests
 
> Only select what applies to this issue

Describe only if needed

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
 
- [ ] Relevant tests are implemented
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Tests pass in CI/CD (if applicable)
- [ ] No regressions introduced
 
---
 
## ⚙️ How to Run Automated Tests (Optional)
 
npm run test
npm run test:e2e

## How to Review
Run automated tests
Verify only relevant test types are included
Check correctness of implemented scenarios

## Notes (Optional)
Add anything important (mocking, edge cases, limitations)
